{"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-k79","title":"Add learn coverage for game-state and Last Guard rules","description":"Expand the learn curriculum to cover core-enforced rules that are not currently represented as dedicated learn subjects or lessons, especially check versus commander danger, checkmate, stalemate, commander captured, repetition and fifty-move draw rules, and Last Guard promotion.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mnoy.dev@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-09T11:33:31Z","created_by":"Hoang Manh","updated_at":"2026-03-09T11:33:31Z"}

{"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-frh.1","title":"Add worked examples for CotuLenh complex rules interactions","description":"Implement the rules-doc follow-up to add concrete example material for the hardest mechanics called out in docs/cotulenh-rules.md. Cover heavy bridge crossing, air-defense pathing outcomes, recombine during deploy, and commander exposure versus direct check. The output can be lesson examples, diagrams, test fixtures, or reusable docs assets, but it should make these mechanics teachable and regression-testable.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mnoy.dev@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-09T11:48:23Z","created_by":"Hoang Manh","updated_at":"2026-03-09T11:48:23Z"}

{"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-frh.2","title":"Add FEN-based advanced assessment set to the CotuLenh rules study plan","description":"Implement the Suggested Next Step from docs/cotulenh-rules-study-plan.md by adding a second question set based on concrete FEN positions. {"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-frh.3","title":"Turn the CotuLenh rules study plan into a reusable lesson QA checklist","description":"Use the review logic, piece-by-piece checklist, and mechanic review checklist from docs/cotulenh-rules-study-plan.md to create a repeatable QA rubric for lesson authors and reviewers.
